title: Apple iPad Air 11-inch M3 128GB Wi-Fi + Cellular $849 + Delivery ($0 C&C/ in-Store) @ JB Hi-Fi
body:
Deal: Apple iPad Air 11-inch M3 128GB Wi-Fi + Cellular $849 + Delivery ($0 C&C/ in-Store) @ JB Hi-Fi

[timedzone] I am pretty sure it is $797 @ HN for PM purposes.
[CptnObvious] why don't you cowards just buy it from HN for once
[timedzone] Coz 1. It is HN and 2. It is oos online.
[Bwild] They won’t price match as sold out online at HN
[timedzone] That is a bold claim, it totally depends on the sales person u get.
[tries] Cellular? That's pretty interesting at this price point and may interest some people. Also makes the RRP higher than JBHIFI says it is
[jmc787] The one use I have found for Apple Intelligence on my iPad is editing photos. If there's something stupid/annoying in your photo just draw a circle around it and bang its gone.
[JohnSy] The battery life on the air vs the pro is around half. There are YouTube videos comparing the two.
